TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-frog_cinhua
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a wawa misi'ayaw cingra tu mialaan nira takula' paruhan nira itini i ccay a talid.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a wawa misiʡajaw ʦiŋra tu miaɾaan nira takuɾaʡ paruħan nira itini i ʦʦaj a taɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: ira ku ccay a wawa misi'ayaw cingra tu mialaan nira takula' paruhan nira itini i ccay a talid.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a wawa misiʡajaw ʦiŋra tu miaɾaan nira takuɾaʡ paruħan nira itini i ʦʦaj a taɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 有一位小孩子面對他抓來的青蛙,將牠裝在一個瓶子裡面.

TRANSL.notes: There was a child facing the frog he caught, putting (it) in a bottle

S.TRANSL: There was a child facing the frog he caught, putting in a bottle

S.FORM: ira ku wacu a mi si'ayaw cangra tura takula' itini i kafuti' nu nira.
S.PHON: ira ku waʦu a mi siʡajaw ʦaŋra tura takuɾaʡ itini i kafutiʡ nu nira.
S.FORM: ira ku wacu a mi si'ayaw cangra tura takula' itini i kafuti' nu nira.
S.PHON: ira ku waʦu a mi siʡajaw ʦaŋra tura takuɾaʡ itini i kafutiʡ nu nira.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻狗,他們面對那隻青蛙.它在這裡睡覺.
There was a dog and they faced the frog. It slept here.

S.FORM: itini i laluma' nu talid kuya takula' nikawrira masadak a milaliw kuya takula' tuni kafuti' nunian a wawa.
S.PHON: itini i ɾaɾumaʡ nu taɾiɬ~ɮ kuja takuɾaʡ nikawrira masaɬ~ɮak a miɾaɾiw kuja takuɾaʡ tuni kafutiʡ nunian a wawa.
S.FORM: itini i laluma' nu talid kuya takula' nikawrira masadak a milaliw kuya takula' tuni kafuti' nunian a wawa.
S.PHON: itini i ɾaɾumaʡ nu taɾiɬ~ɮ kuja takuɾaʡ nikawrira masaɬ~ɮak a miɾaɾiw kuja takuɾaʡ tuni kafutiʡ nunian a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 但是,趁著小孩子睡著,在瓶子裡的這隻青蛙逃離出來.
But the frog inside the bottle went out and left when the child was sleeping.

S.FORM: milaliwitu kuya takula'.
S.PHON: miɾaɾiwitu kuja takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: milaliwitu kuya takula'.
S.PHON: miɾaɾiwitu kuja takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙離開了.
The frog left.

S.FORM: mararumtu ku falucu' nunian a wawa.
S.PHON: mararumtu ku faɾuʦuʡ nunian a wawa.
S.FORM: mararumtu ku falucu' nunian a wawa.
S.PHON: mararumtu ku faɾuʦuʡ nunian a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子非常的難過.
The child was sad.

S.FORM: icuwaitu hakini kuya takula' aku sa'an kura wawa a mikilim.
S.PHON: iʦuwaitu ħakini kuja takuɾaʡ aku saʡan kura wawa a mikiɾim.
S.FORM: icuwaitu hakini kuya takula' aku sa'an kura wawa a mikilim.
S.PHON: iʦuwaitu ħakini kuja takuɾaʡ aku saʡan kura wawa a mikiɾim.
S.TRANSL: 「我的青蛙到哪裡了呢」,那小孩不斷地找.

TRANSL.notes: 'Where is my frog?' The child looked for (the frog).

S.TRANSL: 'Where is my frog?' The child looked for .

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a wacu mapulintu nira kuya talid tuya patelian tuya takula nuya wawa saka.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a waʦu mapuɾintu nira kuja taɾiɬ~ɮ tuja patəɾian tuja takuɾa nuja wawa saka.
S.FORM: ira ku ccay a wacu mapulintu nira kuya talid tuya patelian tuya takula nuya wawa saka.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a waʦu mapuɾintu nira kuja taɾiɬ~ɮ tuja patəɾian tuja takuɾa nuja wawa saka.
S.TRANSL: 因為有一隻狗,所以把小孩裝青蛙的瓶子弄倒了.
Because there was a dog, and therefore the bottle where the child put the frog toppled.

S.FORM: ma'an satu kuya takula' aku.
S.PHON: maʡan satu kuja takuɾaʡ aku.
S.FORM: ma'an satu kuya takula' aku.
S.PHON: maʡan satu kuja takuɾaʡ aku.
S.TRANSL: 「我的青蛙怎麼了?」
'What happened to my frog?'

S.FORM: sa'an cingra a mikilim a miceli' u takula' aku icuwatu sa'an cingra.
S.PHON: saʡan ʦiŋra a mikiɾim a miʦəɾiʡ u takuɾaʡ aku iʦuwatu saʡan ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: sa'an cingra a mikilim a miceli' u takula' aku icuwatu sa'an cingra.
S.PHON: saʡan ʦiŋra a mikiɾim a miʦəɾiʡ u takuɾaʡ aku iʦuwatu saʡan ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他尋找並呼喊著「我的青蛙哪兒去了」.
He searched and called. 'Where is my frog?'

S.FORM: nengnenghanen mumukhantu nuya wacu ku kuya patelian nira tiya takula' a talid.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħanən mumukħantu nuja waʦu ku kuja patəɾian nira tija takuɾaʡ a taɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: nengnenghanen mumukhantu nuya wacu ku kuya patelian nira tiya takula' a talid.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħanən mumukħantu nuja waʦu ku kuja patəɾian nira tija takuɾaʡ a taɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 結果,那隻狗一頭鑽進裝青蛙的瓶子裡.
The dog got into the bottle where he put the frog.

S.FORM: mima'an han isu ku patelian aku tu takula' wa hananay nuna wawa kuna wacu.
S.PHON: mimaʡan ħan isu ku patəɾian aku tu takuɾaʡ wa ħananaj nuna wawa kuna waʦu.
S.FORM: mima'an han isu ku patelian aku tu takula' wa hananay nuna wawa kuna wacu.
S.PHON: mimaʡan ħan isu ku patəɾian aku tu takuɾaʡ wa ħananaj nuna wawa kuna waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 「你為什麼要玩弄我裝青蛙的瓶子?」小孩如此責備那隻狗.
'Why did you play with the bottle where I put the frog?' The child scolded the dog.

S.FORM: saka talacuwatu kuya takula' aku sa'an cingra a miceli' a mikilim.
S.PHON: saka taɾaʦuwatu kuja takuɾaʡ aku saʡan ʦiŋra a miʦəɾiʡ a mikiɾim.
S.FORM: saka talacuwatu kuya takula' aku sa'an cingra a miceli' a mikilim.
S.PHON: saka taɾaʦuwatu kuja takuɾaʡ aku saʡan ʦiŋra a miʦəɾiʡ a mikiɾim.
S.TRANSL: 因此,他不斷呼喚尋找「我的青蛙到哪去了呢」.
'Where is my frog?' He called and searched.

S.FORM: tayra cingra i kilakilangan mikilim tunian a 'pung.
S.PHON: tajra ʦiŋra i kiɾakiɾaŋan mikiɾim tunian a ʡpuŋ.
S.FORM: tayra cingra i kilakilangan mikilim tunian a 'pung.
S.PHON: tajra ʦiŋra i kiɾakiɾaŋan mikiɾim tunian a ʡpuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他去樹林中搜尋涵洞.
He went to the forest and searched the hole.

S.FORM: icuwatu kuya takula' aku hakini.
S.PHON: iʦuwatu kuja takuɾaʡ aku ħakini.
S.FORM: icuwatu kuya takula' aku hakini.
S.PHON: iʦuwatu kuja takuɾaʡ aku ħakini.
S.TRANSL: 「我的青蛙在哪裡呢?」
'Where is my frog?'

S.FORM: itini i hakini tuna 'pung sa'an ku falucu' nira a miceli'.
S.PHON: itini i ħakini tuna ʡpuŋ saʡan ku faɾuʦuʡ nira a miʦəɾiʡ.
S.FORM: itini i hakini tuna 'pung sa'an ku falucu' nira a miceli'.
S.PHON: itini i ħakini tuna ʡpuŋ saʡan ku faɾuʦuʡ nira a miʦəɾiʡ.
S.TRANSL: 「是否在這個洞裡呢?」他這樣說,呼叫著.
'Is it inside this hole?' he said so and called.

S.FORM: takula' aku icuwatu sa'an cingra miceli'.
S.PHON: takuɾaʡ aku iʦuwatu saʡan ʦiŋra miʦəɾiʡ.
S.FORM: takula' aku icuwatu sa'an cingra miceli'.
S.PHON: takuɾaʡ aku iʦuwatu saʡan ʦiŋra miʦəɾiʡ.
S.TRANSL: 「我的青蛙在哪裡呢?」,他這樣說,呼喊著.
'Where is my frog?' He said so and called.

S.FORM: ta tayni satu itini.
S.PHON: ta tajni satu itini.
S.FORM: ta tayni satu itini.
S.PHON: ta tajni satu itini.
S.TRANSL: 然後他來到這裡.
Then he came here.

S.FORM: mararum ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: mararum ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.FORM: mararum ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: mararum ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.TRANSL: 他很難過.
He was sad.

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a 'pung itini i suta'.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a ʡpuŋ itini i sutaʡ.
S.FORM: ira ku ccay a 'pung itini i suta'.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a ʡpuŋ itini i sutaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 正好在地上有一個洞.
There was a hole here on the ground.

S.FORM: kilimen nira itira awaayitu.
S.PHON: kiɾimən nira itira awaajitu.
S.FORM: kilimen nira itira awaayitu.
S.PHON: kiɾimən nira itira awaajitu.
S.TRANSL: 他到那裡找,也沒有.
He searched there, only to find nothing.

S.FORM: na wacu sa'an sa cekucekud sa'an cingra a mi mi anin tunian a matatingay i fafa'ed a a ma'an kura'an.
S.PHON: na waʦu saʡan sa ʦəkuʦəkuɬ~ɮ saʡan ʦiŋra a mi mi anin tunian a matatiŋaj i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ a a maʡan kuraʡan.
S.FORM: na wacu sa'an sa cekucekud sa'an cingra a mi mi anin tunian a matatingay i fafa'ed a a ma'an kura'an.
S.PHON: na waʦu saʡan sa ʦəkuʦəkuɬ~ɮ saʡan ʦiŋra a mi mi anin tunian a matatiŋaj i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ a a maʡan kuraʡan.
S.TRANSL: 狗跳來跳去,玩弄吊在上面的不知是什麼東西.
The dog was jumping, playing with something hung above.

S.FORM: saka m miceli' haca cingra u takula' aku.
S.PHON: saka m miʦəɾiʡ ħaʦa ʦiŋra u takuɾaʡ aku.
S.FORM: saka m miceli' haca cingra u takula' aku.
S.PHON: saka m miʦəɾiʡ ħaʦa ʦiŋra u takuɾaʡ aku.
S.TRANSL: 他仍然呼喊著,「我的青蛙!」
He was still calling, 'My frog!'

S.FORM: takula' aku sa'an cingra a.
S.PHON: takuɾaʡ aku saʡan ʦiŋra a.
S.FORM: takula' aku sa'an cingra a.
S.PHON: takuɾaʡ aku saʡan ʦiŋra a.
S.TRANSL: 「我的青蛙!」他這樣說.
'My frog!' he said so.

S.FORM: ca'ayay pitulas a mikilim tuya takula' nira saka.
S.PHON: ʦaʡajaj pituɾas a mikiɾim tuja takuɾaʡ nira saka.
S.FORM: ca'ayay pitulas a mikilim tuya takula' nira saka.
S.PHON: ʦaʡajaj pituɾas a mikiɾim tuja takuɾaʡ nira saka.
S.TRANSL: 他不斷地找尋他的青蛙.
He kept looking for his frog.

S.FORM: tahira itini itini tu i kilakilangan cingra a mikilim tuya takula'.
S.PHON: taħira itini itini tu i kiɾakiɾaŋan ʦiŋra a mikiɾim tuja takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: tahira itini itini tu i kilakilangan cingra a mikilim tuya takula'.
S.PHON: taħira itini itini tu i kiɾakiɾaŋan ʦiŋra a mikiɾim tuja takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 這時,他又到樹林裡去尋找青蛙.
At this point, he went to the forest to look for the frog.

S.FORM: talacuwatu kuya takula' aku hakini sa'an ku falucu' nira saka.
S.PHON: taɾaʦuwatu kuja takuɾaʡ aku ħakini saʡan ku faɾuʦuʡ nira saka.
S.FORM: talacuwatu kuya takula' aku hakini sa'an ku falucu' nira saka.
S.PHON: taɾaʦuwatu kuja takuɾaʡ aku ħakini saʡan ku faɾuʦuʡ nira saka.
S.TRANSL: 「我的青蛙在哪裡?」他自言自語.
'Where is my frog?' he said so.

S.FORM: mikilim cingra.
S.PHON: mikiɾim ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: mikilim cingra.
S.PHON: mikiɾim ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他繼續找著.
He searched.

S.FORM: mapulin cingra tu pikiliman aca nira makunkun itini i kilakilangan.
S.PHON: mapuɾin ʦiŋra tu pikiɾiman aʦa nira makunkun itini i kiɾakiɾaŋan.
S.FORM: mapulin cingra tu pikiliman aca nira makunkun itini i kilakilangan.
S.PHON: mapuɾin ʦiŋra tu pikiɾiman aʦa nira makunkun itini i kiɾakiɾaŋan.
S.TRANSL: 他在找的時候跌倒了,從樹上跌落下來.
He fell when he was searching, falling down from the tree.

S.FORM: wakang satu itini i suta' kuna wawa.
S.PHON: wakaŋ satu itini i sutaʡ kuna wawa.
S.FORM: wakang satu itini i suta' kuna wawa.
S.PHON: wakaŋ satu itini i sutaʡ kuna wawa.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩仰躺在地上.
The child lay on the ground.

S.FORM: tayra ku ccay a a 'anekak mi sapi siwpaw itini i cingranan.
S.PHON: tajra ku ʦʦaj a a ʡanəkak mi sapi siwpaw itini i ʦiŋranan.
S.FORM: tayra ku ccay a a 'anekak mi sapi siwpaw itini i cingranan.
S.PHON: tajra ku ʦʦaj a a ʡanəkak mi sapi siwpaw itini i ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: 突然來了一隻老鷹,想要俯衝到他這來.
Here came an eagle, which wanted to dive towards him.

S.FORM: matalaw cingra.
S.PHON: mataɾaw ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: matalaw cingra.
S.PHON: mataɾaw ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他很害怕.
He was afraid.

S.FORM: ta tayni satu cingra i fafa'ed nu ongcuy a miceli'.
S.PHON: ta tajni satu ʦiŋra i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ nu o~uŋʦuj a miʦəɾiʡ.
S.FORM: ta tayni satu cingra i fafa'ed nu ongcuy a miceli'.
S.PHON: ta tajni satu ʦiŋra i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ nu o~uŋʦuj a miʦəɾiʡ.
S.TRANSL: 後來他來到大磐石上面呼叫.
He went up onto the rock and called.

S.FORM: u takula' aku icuwaitu hakini sa'an cingra a mikilim.
S.PHON: u takuɾaʡ aku iʦuwaitu ħakini saʡan ʦiŋra a mikiɾim.
S.FORM: u takula' aku icuwaitu hakini sa'an cingra a mikilim.
S.PHON: u takuɾaʡ aku iʦuwaitu ħakini saʡan ʦiŋra a mikiɾim.
S.TRANSL: 「我的青蛙呀在哪裡阿」,他尋找著.
'My frog, where are you?' he said so, searching.

S.FORM: ta tahira itini maaraw nira ku ccay a malunem.
S.PHON: ta taħira itini maaraw nira ku ʦʦaj a maɾunəm.
S.FORM: ta tahira itini maaraw nira ku ccay a malunem.
S.PHON: ta taħira itini maaraw nira ku ʦʦaj a maɾunəm.
S.TRANSL: 在那裡他看見了一隻鹿.
He saw a deer there.

S.FORM: cumikay a mikilim cingra ta matalaw ku falucu' nira tuni ka ira nuna ma malunem.
S.PHON: ʦumikaj a mikiɾim ʦiŋra ta mataɾaw ku faɾuʦuʡ nira tuni ka ira nuna ma maɾunəm.
S.FORM: cumikay a mikilim cingra ta matalaw ku falucu' nira tuni ka ira nuna ma malunem.
S.PHON: ʦumikaj a mikiɾim ʦiŋra ta mataɾaw ku faɾuʦuʡ nira tuni ka ira nuna ma maɾunəm.
S.TRANSL: 他邊跑邊找,心裡害怕那隻麋鹿.
He ran and searched, afraid of this deer.

S.FORM: alul satu cingra a mapulin itini i i nanum.
S.PHON: aɾuɾ satu ʦiŋra a mapuɾin itini i i nanum.
S.FORM: alul satu cingra a mapulin itini i i nanum.
S.PHON: aɾuɾ satu ʦiŋra a mapuɾin itini i i nanum.
S.TRANSL: 他掉入水中,淹沒著.
He fell into the water. He was drowning.

S.FORM: saka tahiratu itini cingra ma alulitu cingra i nanum.
S.PHON: saka taħiratu itini ʦiŋra ma aɾuɾitu ʦiŋra i nanum.
S.FORM: saka tahiratu itini cingra ma alulitu cingra i nanum.
S.PHON: saka taħiratu itini ʦiŋra ma aɾuɾitu ʦiŋra i nanum.
S.TRANSL: 他在水中快淹死了.
He was drowning in the water.

S.FORM: nikawrira maciw nura wacu cingra saka.
S.PHON: nikawrira maʦiw nura waʦu ʦiŋra saka.
S.FORM: nikawrira maciw nura wacu cingra saka.
S.PHON: nikawrira maʦiw nura waʦu ʦiŋra saka.
S.TRANSL: 然而,狗把他救了起來.
But the dog rescued him.

S.FORM: itini satu cingra a toronghantu nira kura wacu i fungoh nu nira itini i nanunanuman.
S.PHON: itini satu ʦiŋra a to~uro~uŋħantu nira kura waʦu i fuŋo~uħ nu nira itini i nanunanuman.
S.FORM: itini satu cingra a toronghantu nira kura wacu i fungoh nu nira itini i nanunanuman.
S.PHON: itini satu ʦiŋra a to~uro~uŋħantu nira kura waʦu i fuŋo~uħ nu nira itini i nanunanuman.
S.TRANSL: 在這裡,在水中他把狗扛在頭上.
Here, he carried the dog on his head in the water.

S.FORM: saka tahira cingra itini mikilim ho cingra tuya.
S.PHON: saka taħira ʦiŋra itini mikiɾim ħo~u ʦiŋra tuja.
S.FORM: saka tahira cingra itini mikilim ho cingra tuya.
S.PHON: saka taħira ʦiŋra itini mikiɾim ħo~u ʦiŋra tuja.
S.TRANSL: 這個時候,他還在找.
At this point, he was still searching.

S.FORM: ca'ay kahemhem ku falucu' nira tu saka tamaaw tuya takula'.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kaħəmħəm ku faɾuʦuʡ nira tu saka tamaaw tuja takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: ca'ay kahemhem ku falucu' nira tu saka tamaaw tuya takula'.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kaħəmħəm ku faɾuʦuʡ nira tu saka tamaaw tuja takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 心裡不死心,想要找到那隻青蛙.
He didn't give up. He wanted to find the frog.

S.FORM: saka mikilimay ho cingra tuya takula' han nira.
S.PHON: saka mikiɾimaj ħo~u ʦiŋra tuja takuɾaʡ ħan nira.
S.FORM: saka mikilimay ho cingra tuya takula' han nira.
S.PHON: saka mikiɾimaj ħo~u ʦiŋra tuja takuɾaʡ ħan nira.
S.TRANSL: 他還是在找他的青蛙.
He was still looking for his frog.

S.FORM: tahira itini maarawtu nira itini i fafaed nu ongcuy ku kuya takula atura wacu nira.
S.PHON: taħira itini maarawtu nira itini i fafaəɬ~ɮ nu o~uŋʦuj ku kuja takuɾa atura waʦu nira.
S.FORM: tahira itini maarawtu nira itini i fafaed nu ongcuy ku kuya takula atura wacu nira.
S.PHON: taħira itini maarawtu nira itini i fafaəɬ~ɮ nu o~uŋʦuj ku kuja takuɾa atura waʦu nira.
S.TRANSL: 此時在大磐石上他看見了他的青蛙和那隻狗.
At this point, he saw the frog and his dog on the rock.

S.FORM: ta lipahak satu falucu' nira pakaaraw tu na takula' itini i fafaed nu fukeloh.
S.PHON: ta ɾipaħak satu faɾuʦuʡ nira pakaaraw tu na takuɾaʡ itini i fafaəɬ~ɮ nu fukəɾo~uħ.
S.FORM: ta lipahak satu falucu' nira pakaaraw tu na takula' itini i fafaed nu fukeloh.
S.PHON: ta ɾipaħak satu faɾuʦuʡ nira pakaaraw tu na takuɾaʡ itini i fafaəɬ~ɮ nu fukəɾo~uħ.
S.TRANSL: 他非常高興看見青蛙在大磐石上.
He was glad to see the frog on the rock.

S.FORM: aluman kura takula' itini i la'enu.
S.PHON: aɾuman kura takuɾaʡ itini i ɾaʡənu.
S.FORM: aluman kura takula' itini i la'enu.
S.PHON: aɾuman kura takuɾaʡ itini i ɾaʡənu.
S.TRANSL: 而在底下也有很多青蛙.
There were many frogs below.

S.FORM: icuwaay kunu nu makuay hakiya sa'an cingra nika.
S.PHON: iʦuwaaj kunu nu makuaj ħakija saʡan ʦiŋra nika.
S.FORM: icuwaay kunu nu makuay hakiya sa'an cingra nika.
S.PHON: iʦuwaaj kunu nu makuaj ħakija saʡan ʦiŋra nika.
S.TRANSL: 他自言自語的說「我的究竟是哪一隻呢?」.
'Which one is mine,' said he.

S.FORM: ira ku ccay tu nu niraay a a takula'.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj tu nu niraaj a a takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: ira ku ccay tu nu niraay a a takula'.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj tu nu niraaj a a takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 其中有一隻是他的青蛙.
One of them was his frog.

S.FORM: saka malepettu nira ku ccay a takula' initu kiya nu makuay a takula' sa'an ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: saka maɾəpəttu nira ku ʦʦaj a takuɾaʡ initu kija nu makuaj a takuɾaʡ saʡan ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.FORM: saka malepettu nira ku ccay a takula' initu kiya nu makuay a takula' sa'an ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: saka maɾəpəttu nira ku ʦʦaj a takuɾaʡ initu kija nu makuaj a takuɾaʡ saʡan ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.TRANSL: 於是,他抓了一隻青蛙,「我的青蛙就是這隻了」,他心想.
He thus grabbed one frog. 'This is my frog,' thought he.

S.FORM: malipahaktu ku falucu' a nira a pakaaraw tu ya takula'.
S.PHON: maɾipaħaktu ku faɾuʦuʡ a nira a pakaaraw tu ja takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: malipahaktu ku falucu' a nira a pakaaraw tu ya takula'.
S.PHON: maɾipaħaktu ku faɾuʦuʡ a nira a pakaaraw tu ja takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 他心裡非常高興,看到那隻青蛙.
He was glad to see the frog.
